title: Crafting Bench
description: A utility mod that adds a custom crafting table with semi-automatic crafting
body: # Crafting Bench A utility mod that adds a custom crafting table with semi-automatic crafting ## Showcase ## Recipe ## Other information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: [https://github.com/lucaargolo/crafting-bench](https://github.com/lucaargolo/crafting-bench) If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to call me on Discord @D4rk#0693 You can find me in the Cafeteria Development guild. [![](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/707435077679841350/embed.png?style=banner2&v=2)](https://discord.com/invite/G4PjhEf)
